welcomeEmail.subject: Welcome to {{appName}}
intro: My name is David — I'm the founder of {{appName}}.
We started {{appName}} because we wanted a tool that doesn't get in your way — no lengthy setup, no sales call before you can try it, just everything you need in one place the moment you sign in.
welcomeEmail.stepsHeading: Here are 3 things to do to get started:
welcomeEmail.ps: Why did you sign up? What are you trying to build? Hit "Reply" and let me know — I read and reply to every email.
